'''''Fey'lya's Pride''''' was the name of [[Borsk Fey'lya]]'s personal [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class shuttle]], which he used during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It was aboard this shuttle that Fey'lya escorted a single [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] escaping from the planet [[Kothlis/Legends|Kothlis]] with a stolen supercomputer that contained the [[Death Star II plans|detailed plans]] and location of the construction of the [[Death Star II/Legends|Death Star II]] during the [[Battle of Kothlis]].

With [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] aboard his personal flagship [[Executor/Legends|Executor]] and the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Avenger/Legends|''Avenger'']] bearing down on the ''[[Kothlis II]]'' station, a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] orbital platform located above Kothlis, Fey'lya and his shuttle docked with the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] [[Razor (CR90 corvette)|''Razor'']] in order to safely deliver the plans to [[Alliance High Command/Legends|Alliance High Command]]. Although ''Kothlis II'' was destroyed and the ''Razor'' was seized by the ''Avenger'', the efforts of Fey'lya and his shuttle aided the escape of the lone Bothan and the Death Star plans.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
